---
name: Security report
about: How to report a vulnerability — please do not file it as a public issue.
---

# ⚠️ Do not file a public issue for security vulnerabilities

A public issue would disclose the vulnerability to everyone, including
attackers, before a fix exists.

**Please report vulnerabilities privately by following the process in
[SECURITY.md](SECURITY.md).**

That document covers the reporting channel, what to include, and what to
expect for triage and disclosure. If you reached this template by
mistake and your report is not security-sensitive, please use the
[bug report](?template=bug_report.md) or
[feature request](?template=feature_request.md) templates instead.

<!-- This template intentionally contains no form. SECURITY.md is the
     single source of truth for the reporting process; keep it that way
     rather than duplicating the policy here. -->
